name: create_rqs_runs
full_help:
create_rqs_runs

Description: 
Create ML Strategy implementation runs

Syntax: 
create_rqs_runs  [-reference_run <arg>] [-quiet] [-verbose]

Usage: 
  Name              Description
  -----------------------------
  [-reference_run]  Reference implementation run name
  [-quiet]          Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]        Suspend message limits during command execution

Categories: 
Timing

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
